steps.title: Identify what the assertion requires
steps.content: The sentence states that 36 cheekscaled frillgobies at station 3 "was not the lowest count at any station." To support this, the blank must provide a data point showing a count lower than 36 — specifically a count of fewer than 36 at some station.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — there were 338 blackspot sergeants observed at station 1.: 338 is far higher than 36, so this contradicts the claim that 36 was not the lowest count. ✗
  • Choice B — there were 9 blackspot sergeants observed at station 3.: The table shows 9 spotted frillgobies at station 3, not 9 blackspot sergeants — this misidentifies the species and misreads the data. ✗
  • Choice C — there were 9 spotted frillgobies observed at station 3.: 9 is lower than 36, and spotted frillgobies at station 3 is the correct data point from the table, directly proving that 36 was not the lowest count. ✓
  • Choice D — there were 65 triplefin blennies observed at station 2.: 65 is higher than 36, so this also contradicts the assertion rather than supporting it. ✗
That is the correct answer.
